description:
Implement `hx-carousel` (T4 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Scrollable carousel/slider for images or content slides.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-carousel.ts`, `hx-carousel.styles.ts`, `hx-carousel.stories.ts`, `hx-carousel.test.ts`

**Props:** `loop` (boolean), `autoplay` (boolean), `autoplay-interval` (ms, default 3000), `slides-per-page` (number, default 1), `slides-per-move` (number, default 1), `orientation` (`horizontal`|`vertical`), `mouse-dragging` (boolean)

**`hx-carousel-item`:** wrapper for each slide, `role="group"` with `aria-label="Slide N of M"`

**Slots:** default (hx-carousel-item children), `next-button`, `previous-button`

**Events:** `hx-slide-change` (`{ index, slide }`)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `scroll-container`, `pagination`, `pagination-item` (dot indicators), `navigation` (prev/next buttons)

**ARIA:** `role="region"` with `aria-label="Carousel"`. Scroll container: `aria-live="polite"` when autoplay stopped. Previous/next buttons: `aria-label="Previous slide"` / `aria-label="Next slide"`. Pagination dots: `aria-label="Slide N"`, `aria-current` on active.

**Autoplay:** Must pause on hover, focus, and when `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`. Play/pause toggle button required for WCAG 2.2.2.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (navigation, autoplay pause, loop, keyboard), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with images + multi-slide, bundle < 5KB.

Register `hx-carousel` and `hx-carousel-item` in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-carousel — T4 Image/Content Carousel
